title: Bottoms Up
writer: David Butler, Buddy G. DeSylva, Sid Silvers
actors: Spencer Tracy, Pat Paterson, John Boles
plot: Promoter Smoothie King helps a pair of phonies con their way into a movie company. As Wanda heads toward stardom, she turns more and more from King toward the matinée idol. King must decide between his plans and her happiness.
